mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recruitment_application_profile_snapshot ( application_id, display_name, job_category, profile_file_id, short_intro, description, is_portfolio_public, source_profile_updated_at, created_at ) VALUES ( #{applicationId}, #{displayName}, #{jobCategory}, #{profileFileId}, #{intro}, #{description}, #{isPortfolioPublic}, #{sourceProfileUpdatedAt}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT application_id, display_name, job_category, profile_file_id, short_intro, description, is_portfolio_public, source_profile_updated_at, created_at FROM recruitment_application_profile_snapshot WHERE application_id = #{applicationId}
SELECT tech_stack FROM recruitment_application_profile_snapshot_tech_stack WHERE application_id = #{applicationId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
